title: UTILITY ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: HEART OF THE CITY UTILITY ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides financial assistance with electric and natural gas bills. Assistance is limited and based on current funding. It is limited to once per calendar year and is not guaranteed. 28925 SW Boberg Road Wilsonville, OR 97070 Eligibility: Must have a documented hardship and be a current PGE or NW Natural customer Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-2pm Email (503) 582-8680 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 582-8680 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website and complete intake form FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Current utility bill LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Aurora, Donald, Hubbard, and Wilsonville Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Gas Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: MATERIAL GOODS - HOMELESS SUPPORT SERVICES TEMPORARY FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE - FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HEART OF THE CITY
